items.blocker: D+0 critical-path new HEXA, ~150 LoC est, can emit pre-API
D+0 critical-path new HEXA, ~100 LoC est, can emit pre-API
D+0 critical-path new HEXA, ~120 LoC est, mirror of N-3 sibling

critical_path_to_d0: D-14: user submits application via FinalSpark form (SEPARATE AUTHORIZATION)
D-7..D-1: emit 3 critical-path HEXA in parallel; dry-run on synthetic spike data
D+0: API creds received -> §6.3 sanity gates first (1 organoid, 1 prompt)
D+1..D+7: campaign wave 1 (16 prompts × 3 seeds × 5 reps × 4 organoids = 960 stim cycles)
D+8: §6.1 verdict gate against locked CLM + EEG baselines
D+15: PASS report + T1-A26 graduation, OR FAIL report + encoding-revision proposal
